ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plenary_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plenary item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the plenary item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the plenary item belongs to */,
  "tabled_date" TEXT /* Date the plenary item was tabled */,
  "plenary_date" TEXT /* Date of the plenary session where the item was discussed */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of plenary item (e.g., bill, motion, statement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plenary item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plenary item (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plenary_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legislator, staff, public) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within their department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plenary_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plenary session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the plenary session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the plenary session took place */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda for the plenary session */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the plenary session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plenary item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the plenary item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the plenary item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES plenary_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plenary item the document is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., bill, report, statement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES plenary_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_items" (
  "session_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for this association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plenary session */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plenary item */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the plenary item in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES plenary_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_items_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES plenary_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plenary item being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislator casting the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast (e.g., yes, no, abstain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES plenary_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plenary item being amended */,
  "proposed_by" TEXT /* Name of the legislator proposing the amendment */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date when the amendment was proposed */,
  "amendment_text" TEXT /* Text of the proposed amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES plenary_items ("item_id")
)
